option_length_balance.method: Each option set kept within ~20% of mean word count; correct answer is NOT systematically the longest. Longest option is the CORRECT answer in 1 of 6 questions (q1), well below the bias threshold.

questions.objective_ref: Explain what the EU AI Act is, in one or two plain sentences.
Name the four risk tiers — unacceptable, high, limited, and minimal — and order them from most to least dangerous.
Give a concrete example of an AI system in each tier (social scoring = unacceptable).
Describe, at a high level, what the law requires for each tier — high-risk obligations: documentation, testing, human oversight.
Give a concrete example of an AI system in each tier + what the law requires per tier (minimal = no mandatory rules; conformity assessment is high-risk only).
Connect the Act back to the four pillars from 5.4 — see how it turns ethics into enforceable law.
